justifications.clarity: Retrospective context box orients the reader before the survey; LLM deployment patterns defined with precise set notation; OpenClaw's four design principles are numbered and concrete; chain-of-thought credit trace illustrates explainability directly.
justifications.rigor: Fairness impossibility proposition is mathematically correct and attributed; RRF formula correctly parameterised with k=60; SR 11-7 three-lines-of-defence accurately described; minor deduction for conformal prediction mention without formal coverage definition.
justifications.completeness: All 6 sections and 22 subsections contain real content; chapter fulfils survey, implementation (OpenClaw), ethics, deployment, and future-trends roles; five concrete open research problems identified; minor gap: calibration not linked to Brier score or reliability diagrams.
justifications.pedagogy: Eight learning objectives map to sections; deployment heuristics table, SR 11-7 checklist example, and OpenClaw skills example concretise abstract principles; closing section delivers coherent responsible-AI argument that frames the entire book.
justifications.style: Natural expert prose; no filler phrases or \paragraph{} headings; OpenClaw coverage is descriptive not promotional; final reproducibility remark is a practical addition; notation consistent throughout.
